blocks.content: Master the micro-level developer tools in AGV before moving on to fully autonomous agents.

blocks.title: Inline Completions
blocks.content: Create a new file called `calculator.py`. Inside the file, press **Cmd + I** (Mac) or **Ctrl + I** (Windows/Linux) to open the inline prompt.
blocks.prompt: Create a function to calculate the factorial of a number.
blocks.footer: Hit Enter to generate and accept the code.

blocks.title: Context Passing
blocks.content: Intentionally break the code (e.g., delete a required colon `:`). Highlight the broken function, press **Cmd + L** (or **Ctrl + L**).
blocks.prompt: What is wrong with this code?
blocks.footer: Notice how AGV automatically attaches the highlighted code block as context to the agent's side panel.

blocks.title: Explain and Fix
blocks.content: Hover your mouse over the red squiggly error line in the editor. Click the **Quick Fix** or **Explain** lightbulb icon to have the AI resolve the syntax error instantly.
